G5E_NONE_ABOVE (G5E) None of Above Modes of Locomotion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of locomotion in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
247 G6A G6A_BEDFAST (G6A) Bedfast All/Most of Time CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of transfer in last 7 days - bedfast all or most of the time. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
